change_reason: Child 4 (WI-4324) Ollama Phase 1: insert ADR-OLLAMA-HARNESS-ADOPTION-001 per GO -002; content derived from bridge/gtkb-ollama-integration-phase-1-001.md drafts + -003 guard-adapter delta; owner anchor DELIB-20260663.
explicit_change_request: Implement Child 4 (gtkb-ollama-integration-phase-1-governance-impl): WI-4324 -- insert the 5 formal MemBase specs via formal-artifact-approval packets. As interactive Prime I mint packets with presented_to_user=true and transcript_captured=true by presenting full artifact content in chat. Owner anchor DELIB-20260663; GO bridge/gtkb-ollama-integration-phase-1-governance-impl-002.md.
full_content:
{
  "id": "ADR-OLLAMA-HARNESS-ADOPTION-001",
  "type": "architecture_decision",
  "status": "specified",
  "title": "Adopt Ollama as the fourth GT-KB coding harness via a Python tool-calling shim and static TOML routing",
  "scope": "GT-KB platform harness adoption; Phase 1 of PROJECT-GTKB-OLLAMA-INTEGRATION (harness identity D).",
  "tags": ["architecture-decision", "ollama", "harness", "phase-1", "ollama-integration"],
  "description": "Decision: GroundTruth-KB adopts Ollama as harness identity D using a lightweight Python shim (scripts/ollama_harness.py) that wraps Ollama's HTTP api/chat tool-calling endpoint, with task-to-model routing managed by a static .ollama/routing.toml file. In Phase 1 harness D is registered with an empty role-set ([]); it is not promoted to an active Prime Builder or Loyal Opposition role and is not wired into bridge dispatch.\n\nContext: Two Loyal Opposition INSIGHTS reports classified Ollama adoption as 'adopt'. Ollama is a model-hosting server; its native CLI does not handle the tool-execution loop. GT-KB requires harness-side tool dispatch to be compatible with bridge-compliance-gate.py, scanner-safe-writer.py, the destructive-gate, the formal/narrative approval gates, and author-metadata env-var injection.\n\nRejected alternatives: (B) LangChain/LangGraph framework -- rejected per AUQ#1 for dependency bloat and context overhead; (C) CLI pass-through with command parsing -- rejected per AUQ#1 for unreliable tool calling and safety hazard.\n\nConsequences (positive): zero framework bloat; direct tool-API alignment; granular env-var injection control; reversible (the shim is a standalone script). Consequences (negative): ~150-300 lines of Python tool-loop code to maintain; per-model tool-calling quality varies. Risk mitigation: smaller models reserved for read-only checks; complex tasks routed to Qwen 2.5 Coder 14B and larger.\n\nFail-closed guard-adapter consequence (per umbrella revision bridge/gtkb-ollama-integration-phase-1-003.md): Ollama is a standalone local process and does not inherit Claude Code or Codex PreToolUse hooks. Therefore the Python shim MUST include a fail-closed local guard adapter that invokes the existing GT-KB guard scripts before any mutating model-requested tool call (Write, Edit, Bash). See DCL-OLLAMA-TOOL-PARITY-GATE-001 for the binding contract.\n\nOwner decision anchor: DELIB-20260663 (12-AUQ Ollama Phase 1 decision set; Option A framework-free shim, static routing, heavy governance, harness D registered/no-active-role).",
  "assertions": [
    {"type": "file_exists", "file": "scripts/ollama_harness.py", "description": "Python tool-calling shim exists."},
    {"type": "file_exists", "file": ".ollama/routing.toml", "description": "Static task-to-model routing config exists."},
    {"type": "grep_absent", "file": "scripts/ollama_harness.py", "pattern": "langchain", "description": "Shim is framework-free (no langchain import)."},
    {"type": "grep", "file": "scripts/ollama_harness.py", "pattern": "invoke_guard_adapter", "description": "Mutating tool dispatch routes through the fail-closed guard adapter."},
    {"kind": "behavioral", "description": "harness-state/harness-registry.json records harness D with status 'registered' and role-set [] (no active role).", "verifying_test": "platform_tests/scripts/test_ollama_governance_artifacts.py + Child 1 foundation verification (bridge/gtkb-ollama-integration-phase-1-foundation-012.md VERIFIED)."}
  ]
}
